title: The Slugterracraft - Legends of Slugterra
description: The Slugterracraft uses the mod Legends of Slugterra to brings the animated series to Minecraft! Explore underground, collect elemental slugs, and battle enemies. Use slug-blasters and become the ultimate slug master in this adventure!
body:
![Slugterracraft Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c17d78fa93ca69c702c0f533834f948ddf3dbec.png)

Step into the underground **world of Slugterra** with this exciting Minecraft modpack! Inspired by the popular animated series, this mod brings the thrilling adventures of **slugs and their epic transformations** to life in your Minecraft world. Based all around the **Legends of Slugterra Mod**. Whether you're a fan of the show or simply a lover of new mods, this pack offers an immersive experience with tons of new content, all based around the slug-powered action of _**Slugterra**_. With a little extra mods to improve the experience.

 

- 🔥 **Slug-Slinging Combat** – Collect and use slugs to unleash their unique abilities in battle!
- 🕳️ **Expansive Underground World** – Explore The Underground with hidden treasures, powerful enemies, and legendary slugs.
- 🛠️ **Custom Tech & Gear** – Craft your own blasters and slug containers to become the ultimate slug-slinger.
- ⚔️ **New Mobs** – Face off other slugs all around the underground world.
 

Dive into the action-packed **world of Slugterra** right from the start, and take your slug-slinging skills to the next level. Will you become the greatest slug-slinger in Minecraft? **Download The Slugterracraft Modpack today and find out!**
